stemHtml: You are the pilot flying an aircraft from Airport A to Airport B. You take off from Airport A, which is set at an elevation of 552 feet with an altimeter setting of 1020 hPa. At your arrival at Airport B, you notice you forgot to change your pressure setting to the local QNH of 1018 hPa. Knowing that the arrival airport's elevation is 332 feet, what altitude will you read from your altimeter?
